title: Help, Result Formatting, Streams, and Terminal Accessibility · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Help Information
summary: Commands mix data and prose, errors appear on stdout, help order changes across runs, long records become unreadable, and progress depends on color and cursor motion. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go help information increment in screen-reader-friendly deterministic terminal presenter. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
